docs.title: Welcome to A18 Global Core
docs.text: Система мониторинга, вещания и управления активами. Админ: Сергей Давыдов (A18)

docs.title: 10. Android 14 Power Management Fix
docs.text: Если пайплайн падает ночью: 1. Отключить "Battery Optimization" для Termux и Radio Bot. 2. termux-wake-lock — обязателен. 3. Перед запуском TTS: termux-volume music 15.

docs.title: Vision
docs.text: Claude Code Flow is a personal development system for planning, guiding, and shipping work step by step.

docs.title: Goal
docs.text: Build a clean base for my own coding workflow.

docs.title: Principles
docs.text:
• Keep it simple.
  • Keep it structured.
  • Keep it reusable.
  • Focus on launch first, polish later.

docs.title: Next steps
docs.text:
• Clean the repository.
  • Add a basic project structure.
  • Define the main entry point.
  • Expand only after the core works.
